svg.text:
Using matrix in SVG We use two types of matrix
Matrix with only one column for coordinates To use also translation with matrix, we have homogenous coordinates x y 1
Matrix 3 x 3 for transformation :
a c e b d f 0 0 1
To get coordinates of transformed point, we multiply these matrix a * x + c * y + e b * x + d * y + f 1
